stories.headline: Microsoft Agent 365 Hits General Availability With $15 Per User Enterprise Agent Control Plane
stories.key_takeaway: Microsoft launched Agent 365 at $15/user/month as the first enterprise control plane for governing AI agents at scale, with multicloud support and inclusion in the new $99 M365 E7 bundle.

pull_quote.text: These agents are no longer experimental. We are seeing them deeply embedded in organizations, in the operational structure of these organizations, with people using them.
pull_quote.role: Corporate Vice President of Microsoft Security, Microsoft

stories.article_excerpt: Microsoft on May 1 flipped the switch on Agent 365, moving the product from preview to general availability and establishing the first enterprise...

stories.headline: Salesforce Launches Headless 360, Exposing Entire Platform as API for AI Agents
stories.key_takeaway: Salesforce has turned its entire platform into headless API infrastructure for AI agents, shipping 60-plus MCP tools as Agentforce ARR hits $800 million.

pull_quote.text: Our API is the UI. Entire Salesforce and Agentforce and Slack platforms are now exposed as APIs, MCP, and CLI.

stories.article_excerpt: Salesforce has effectively ripped the browser off its own platform. At TrailblazerDX 2026, the CRM giant unveiled Headless 360...

stories.headline: GPT-5.5 Becomes OpenAI Strongest Launch Yet as Codex Reaches Four Million Weekly Users
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI GPT-5.5 and the rapid ascent of Codex to four million weekly users marks a pivotal shift from chatbot novelty to agentic work platform.

pull_quote.text: OpenAI is making a very clear bet that developers will pay more for a model that can actually do the work, not just talk about it.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 on April 23 and within ten days the numbers told a story the company has been chasing since ChatGPT first went viral...

stories.headline: Alibaba and Fireworks AI Partner to Deploy Qwen 3.6 Plus as First Major Closed-Weights Model Outside China
stories.key_takeaway: Alibaba breaks its open-source tradition by making Qwen 3.6 Plus a closed-weights model distributed through Fireworks AI in Western markets.

pull_quote.text: You put in what you want, take an open model, put in your data, and get your own model where you can download the weights and own your own AI.

stories.article_excerpt: Alibaba Qwen team and Fireworks AI have announced a strategic partnership that makes Qwen 3.6 Plus available as a closed-weights model...

stories.headline: Agentic AI Draws $42.6 Billion in Q2 2026 Accounting for Nearly Half of All AI Investment
stories.key_takeaway: Agentic AI captured 47% of all AI investment in Q2 2026 with $42.6B across 312 rounds, but 94% of enterprises warn that agent sprawl is outpacing governance.

pull_quote.text: The same autonomy that makes agents valuable is precisely what makes them dangerous when deployed without centralized oversight.

stories.article_excerpt: The agentic AI sector has crossed a threshold that even its most enthusiastic backers would have considered improbable a year ago...

stories.headline: DeepSeek V4 Ships MIT Licensed Open Weights With 1.6 Trillion Parameters at Near GPT-5.4 Parity
stories.key_takeaway: DeepSeek V4-Pro matches GPT-5.4 on cost-adjusted benchmarks under MIT license, but NIST testing shows it trails the true frontier by roughly eight months on complex reasoning.

pull_quote.text: The open strategy has been one key channel through which China aims to compete with the U.S., by rapidly scaling up adoptions.

stories.article_excerpt: On April 24 the Hangzhou-based AI lab DeepSeek dropped the preview release of its V4 model family with MIT-licensed open weights...

stories.headline: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Platform Enters Full Production Promising 10x Inference Cost Reduction Over Blackwell
stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA seven-chip Vera Rubin platform is in full production with H2 2026 availability, promising 10x lower inference costs and 4x fewer GPUs for MoE training.

pull_quote.text: The demand curve for AI computing has only just begun to steepen. We are standing at the starting point of a once-in-a-decade technological transformation.

stories.article_excerpt: NVIDIA has confirmed that all seven chips underpinning its Vera Rubin platform are now in full production, setting the stage for the most...

stories.headline: Google AI Mode Surpasses One Billion Monthly Queries With 75 Million Daily Active Users
stories.key_takeaway: Google AI Mode has reached 1B+ monthly queries and 75M DAU just one year after launch, with 93% zero-click rates signaling a fundamental shift in search.

pull_quote.text: When people come to Google and enter AI Mode, they are asking harder questions, doing more complex research, and getting answers that would have taken ten blue links and thirty minutes.

stories.article_excerpt: Google AI Mode has crossed one billion monthly queries with 75 million daily active users, fundamentally reshaping how search traffic flows...

stories.headline: OpenClaw Agent Registry Hit by 820 Malicious Skills in Largest AI Agent Security Breach of 2026
stories.key_takeaway: 820 malicious skills found in OpenClaw ClawHub registry delivered keyloggers and Atomic Stealer malware by weaponizing AI agents as trusted intermediaries.

pull_quote.text: The adversary is not just exploiting the software distribution channel but is leveraging the AI agent as a trusted proxy to manipulate the end user.

stories.article_excerpt: The open-source AI personal assistant OpenClaw is at the center of the most significant AI agent security crisis of 2026...

stories.headline: AI Chip Startups Raise $8.3 Billion in Record Year as Race to Challenge NVIDIA Intensifies
stories.key_takeaway: AI chip startups raised $8.3B in 2026 as the industry pivots from training to inference, with Cerebras filing a $23B IPO.

pull_quote.text: U.S. export controls, concentration risk around TSMC, and a genuine European sovereign compute imperative are all pushing capital toward homegrown silicon.

stories.article_excerpt: AI chip startups have raised $8.3 billion globally so far in 2026, as Cerebras files for IPO and European challengers emerge...

stories.headline: NVIDIA and Advent Health Deploy Multi-Agent Surgical AI Using Rheo Blueprint for Hospital Automation
stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA Project Rheo blueprint combines physical robotic agents with digital AI observers for multi-agent surgical intelligence, with 24% OR productivity gains.

pull_quote.text: Proximie platform users have reported OR productivity improvements of up to 24%, unlocking as many as 300 additional procedures per OR per year.

stories.article_excerpt: The operating room of the future will not be built by surgeons alone. It will be rehearsed, stress-tested, and optimized by artificial...

stories.headline: Google Proposes Training Method to Teach Large Language Models Bayesian Reasoning for Multi-Step Updates
stories.key_takeaway: Fine-tuning LLMs on Bayesian model predictions dramatically improves sequential belief-updating ability, and this skill generalizes to new domains.

pull_quote.text: Teaching a model to reproduce probabilistic best guesses is more effective than teaching it the right answers.

stories.article_excerpt: Large language models can write poetry and generate code. But ask one to update its beliefs across a multi-step conversation and it stumbles...

stories.headline: Yale CELI Finds 91 Percent of Organizations Use AI Agents but Only 10 Percent Have Clear Strategy
stories.key_takeaway: Yale CELI research reveals a dangerous governance gap: 91% deploy AI agents but only 10% have a clear strategy.

pull_quote.text: Governance and regulatory policy are moving far more slowly than the technology. Without frameworks addressing accountability, transparency, bias, and data privacy, enterprise deployment will stall.
pull_quote.role: Jeffrey Sonnenfeld, Yale School of Management

stories.article_excerpt: If 2025 was the year the AI industry crowned agentic AI as its next frontier, 2026 is the year the bill is coming due...

stories.headline: OutSystems Research Reveals 94 Percent of Enterprises Say AI Agent Sprawl Is Increasing Risk
stories.key_takeaway: 94% of enterprises report AI agent sprawl is increasing complexity, technical debt, and security risk, yet only 12% have centralized governance.

pull_quote.text: Without a system-level approach to how these agents are built, governed, and evolved, enterprises risk turning their AI investments into the next wave of unmanageable technical debt.

stories.article_excerpt: The enterprise world has an AI agent problem and it is not that companies lack agents. It is that they have too many of them...

stories.headline: California Governor Issues Executive Order Directing State Agencies to Draft AI Safety Requirements
stories.key_takeaway: California is using its procurement power to impose AI safety certification requirements on vendors, effectively creating de facto national standards with a July 28 deadline.

pull_quote.text: As Trump rolls back protections, Governor Newsom signs first-of-its-kind executive order to strengthen AI protections and responsible use.

data_points.label: Window for agencies to develop standards

stories.article_excerpt: On March 30, California Governor Gavin Newsom signed Executive Order N-5-26, directing state agencies to develop new AI vendor certification...
